_comment: Live state-detection tuning for bin/claude-mate-wrap. Case-insensitive substrings matched against the rendered claude TUI screen. Hot-reloaded (~0.25s), no restart. Precedence: error > waiting > waiting_footer > busy > idle. Matching is scoped to Claude's LIVE STATUS REGION (bottom ~20 non-empty lines) for error/waiting/busy, so error/prompt keywords in scrollback/logs/code/conversation above don't false-trigger. 'waiting_footer' holds GENERIC picker phrases matched ONLY in the last ~4 lines.
waiting: tell claude what to do differently
